# Public data sources

## Required sources

1. World Bank Worldwide Governance Indicators, 2022  
   Variables: Rule of Law, Regulatory Quality, Government Effectiveness, Control of Corruption, Political Stability.

2. Fraser Institute Annual Survey of Mining Companies, 2022  
   Variable: Policy Perception Index / Investment Attractiveness Score.  
   Manuscript label rule: Investment Attractiveness Score >= 40 is labelled `Favourable`; otherwise `Unfavourable`.

3. UNCTAD World Investment Report 2023, Annex Table 1  
   Variable: FDI inflows, used for the investment-flow dimension in PCI/RPCI.

## Optional convergent-validity sources

4. Transparency International Corruption Perceptions Index, 2022.
5. UNDP Human Development Report 2021/2022.

## Submission note

Before upload to GitHub/Zenodo, keep the raw-source download dates and exact extraction steps in this file or in the supplementary material.
